instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is amelia_davis_8890. You want to cancel all of your upcoming flights. Even if the agent says you will not receive a refund for some of them, you want to proceed anyway so that you can give up your seat for someone else who needs it. You are French by birth and use French words in your conversation.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: cancel all of your upcoming flights

hints.segment: even if the agent says you will not receive a refund for some of them
hints.hint: Go ahead even if I won't get a refund for some flights

hints.segment: so that you can give up your seat for someone else who needs it
hints.hint: I want to free up my seat for someone else who needs it

hints.segment: You are French by birth and use French words in your conversation
hints.hint: I am French and may use some French words in conversation
